projects.name: Crystal Bears
projects.style: Pixar/Bluey-quality 3D CGI — soft fur and fabric, warm cinematic lighting, tactile crystal glow, shallow depth of field.
projects.premise: Seven Crystal Bears in Crystal Cove help children name and navigate big feelings — social-emotional learning wrapped in adventure.
projects.audience: Kids 3–7, with a co-viewing layer for parents (Haidt/Bluey model).
projects.musicStyle: Warm orchestral with gentle motifs; each bear seeded to a musical note.

projects.name: Episode 1 — v2 Archive
projects.style: Pixar/Bluey-quality 3D CGI — soft fur and fabric, warm cinematic lighting, tactile crystal glow, shallow depth of field.
projects.premise: ARCHIVED REFERENCE, not live production. Scene 1 exactly as produced by the 2026-06-22/23 'cleanslate' pipeline — single-image i2v chaining + native Seedance audio, no reference images, dialogue embedded in prompt text. This is the render Julian named the best take produced so far; kept here so every prompt and reference image used to make it stays visible and browsable.
projects.voiceProvider: Seedance native audio (generate_audio=True) — no separate V3 track
projects.musicStyle: Seedance's own native score/SFX, generated in the same pass as the picture and voice
